title:
Lesson 1:
I'm Distracted / I Need to Focus
description: 'Dalgınım' = I'm distracted / spaced out. 'Odaklanmam gerekiyor' = I need to focus. 'Dikkat etmem gerekiyor' = I need to pay attention. 'Başka bir şey düşünüyordum' = I was thinking about something else.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Seni üç kez çağırdım. Duymadın mı?
dialogue.english: I called you three times. Didn't you hear?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Özür dilerim, başka bir şey düşünüyordum.
dialogue.english: Sorry, I was thinking about something else.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: You're right. I need to focus more.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Especially at work. You need to pay attention.

vocabulary.english: I was thinking about something else
